title: Mobile App Suggestion: Allow collapse/expand on task items
excerpt:
On the app, allow items to be collapsible/expandable to see subitems

It would be helpful if task items would be collapsible or expandable like in the website, to see the subitems that pertain to that task item. My team…

posts.author: angel.cfiw (Angel)
posts.cookedHtml:
• On the app, allow items to be collapsible/expandable to see subitems

It would be helpful if task items would be collapsible or expandable like in the website, to see the subitems that pertain to that task item. My team and I (and I’m sure others too) find it confusing to chase subitems & redundant to go back and forth to try to look at main items and subitems at the same time.

posts.author: hkjohn (jawn)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed - it’s almost unusable this way as we have many subitems attached to each main item
